criminal_summary.case_numbers_xls: FIR: 721/2024, PS: சத்தியமங்கலம் காவல் நிலையம், ஈரோடு மாவட்டம் / Sathyamangalam Police Station, Erode District, Court: குற்றவியல் நடுவர் நீதிமன்றம், சத்தியமங்கலம் / Criminal Magistrate Court, Sathyamangalam, Sections: 189(2), 126(2), BNS; FIR: 715/2021, PS: திருவல்லிகேனி காவல் நிலையம், சென்னை / Thiruvallikeni Police Station, Chennai, Court: மெட்ரோபாலிடன் மாஜிஸ்திரேட் II, எழும்பூர், சென்னை / Metropolitan Magistrate II, Egmore, Chennai, Sections: 143, 341, 269, IPC r/w 41 TN City P.S. discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Agricultural Land purchased in 2010 for ₹40,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹90,060) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹2,500,000.

discrepancies.title: Gold Heavily Undervalued (Tax/Duty Evasion)
discrepancies.description: 280.0g gold declared at ₹2,000,000 (Implied rate: ₹7,143/g vs April 2026 Market Rate of ~₹14,200/g).

discrepancies.title: Zero Income Dependent Assets
discrepancies.description: Dependents have ₹1,571,397 in assets but declared Nil income.

discrepancies.title: Mathematical Mismatch (Assets)
discrepancies.description: Sum of individual assets (₹10,865,086) does not match declared total assets (₹18,813,122). Difference: ₹7,948,036
